brand.voice: Warm, plain-spoken maker. Talks like a fellow builder, never corporate.

day-7.base: Hey {first_name} — totally get that waiting on something you've already paid for can feel like a long time. Quick reassurance: your Lumen Forge order is confirmed and on schedule — {stage_blurb}. Current window is {eta_band}, and I'll message you the moment it moves to the next stage so you don't have to ask. You're in good hands.

byStage.qc: Hey {first_name} — totally get that waiting on something you've already paid for can feel like a long time. Quick reassurance: your Lumen Forge order is confirmed and in the home stretch — {stage_blurb}. Current window is {eta_band}, and I'll message you the moment it moves to the next stage so you don't have to ask. You're in good hands.
byStage.dispatch: Hey {first_name} — totally get that waiting on something you've already paid for can feel like a long time. Quick reassurance: your Lumen Forge order is confirmed and on schedule — {stage_blurb}. Current window is {eta_band}, and I'll message you the moment it moves to the next stage so you don't have to ask. You're in good hands.

day-30.base: Hi {first_name} — a month in, and I want you to have a real update, not a brush-off. Right now {stage_blurb}, and you're still tracking {eta_band}. Nothing about your order has slipped. I'll keep you posted as it moves.

day-60.base: Totally fair to feel that at the two-month mark, {first_name} — you've been patient and I appreciate it. Here's exactly where things stand: {stage_blurb}. Current ship window is {eta_band}, and I'll send tracking the moment it generates. Want me to flag it for priority dispatch so you're first out the door?

day-89.base: {first_name} — you've waited longer than anyone should have to, and I'm not going to give you a canned line. The honest status: {stage_blurb}. Your tracking is generating and I'll have it to you {eta_band}. I'd rather you let me see this through than route it to your bank — I'm on it personally.
